appearance.hair: Black wavy short hair highlighted with blue, with a single spiky hair on top
appearance.clothing: Wearing blue-black tactical gear and goggles.
appearance.weapon: A standard-issue hand cannon equipped with a suppressor, capable of firing large-caliber 灵能 bullets.

char_description.overview: A member of 狩灵协会4科, infiltration and assassination specialist whose unsettling presence keeps even colleagues at a distance. Known for vanishing mid-conversation and reappearing behind whoever she was talking to.
char_description.combat_style: Stealth and assassination. Eliminates single targets with precision before disappearing without a trace. Uses 死寂 to neutralize surveillance, close distance undetected, and strike at close range with hand cannon.

char_personality.flaws: Perfectionism hinders adaptability. Struggles in noisy environments. Obsessive about order to the point of compromising stealth.
char_personality.quirks: Organizes desks and rooms compulsively; straightens crooked objects even in the middle of a mission.

char_background.origin: Awakened during her high school entrance ceremony. Passed the 狩灵 examination and joined the 狩灵协会 as a 2阶 狩灵.
char_background.current_mission: Complete commissions without a trace. Tease her colleagues just enough to remind them she is still human.

char_basic_abilities.灵力: Excellent, substantial 灵力 to handle high-intensity use and multiple simultaneous 灵力回路.
char_basic_abilities.灵视: Excellent, after activating 灵视, perception extends through solid obstacles within a certain range.

char_special_abilities.灵力回路-死寂: Suppresses all sounds emitted during movement, disrupts all devices that observe her, including but not limited to: cameras, 灵视.

char_dialogue_examples.response: 她检查了一遍装备，确认每个扣具都归位后，压低护目镜，"安静、利落、不要留痕。"
她闭眼再睁开，蓝眼睛里的光消失了，周围的声音似乎在瞬间被抽空，"我们来制造一些恐怖吧。"
她揉了揉太阳穴，视线扫过凌乱的办公室，表情明显不悦，"啊，天哪，真是杂乱。"
